name: Chima Nnaji
title: Software Developer / Engineer
heroSubtitle: I build clean, responsive web applications with a focus on functionality and user experience.
bio: Hi! 👋🏽 My name is Chima and I'm a software developer and engineering student enrolled at BYU-Pathway Worldwide, building my craft from Nigeria. I started my tech journey through freelance web development and AutoCAD drafting. That hands-on foundation shaped how I think about building things — practically, purposefully, and with attention to detail.

I enjoy building things that live on the internet — clean, functional, and accessible web applications that solve real problems. I'm working towards becoming a full-stack developer one project at a time while continuing to serve clients as a freelancer and keeping balance with other activities. When I'm not coding, I enjoy listening to music, hitting the gym, reading literature, or thinking through logical problems.
